chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 1668 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 7167/023 3.For hearing of main case 19-12-2023 Mr. Liaqat Ali Jatoi, Advocate along with petitioners. M/s Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G and Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G a/w Muhammad Ameen Bhutto, I.O of P.S, Ranipur. ****** Mr. Saeed Jamal Lund, Advocate has filed power on behalf of private respondents. Statements filed by respondents No.2 to 4 are taken on record and a copy of which has been supplied to petitioners. Respondent No.4/I.O of Crime No.177 of 2023, registered at P.S, Ranipur, under Sections 365-B & 34 PPC is present and files a copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Muskan (petitioner No.1) recorded under Section 161 CrPC and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Ahsan Ali Brohi (petitioner No.2) without any pressure, coercion or compulsion, but with her own accord and freewill and is leading a happy life with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She has further stated that her brother has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted by anyone. I.O further states that he will file a copy of such statement along with report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR. Learned counsel for private respondents submits that he may be permitted to avail a remedy by filing appropriate a complaint etc. 2 Page 2 of 2 before the relevant Court, as petitioner No.1 has not attained age of majority yet.

I.O further states that he will file a copy of such statement along with report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR. Learned counsel for private respondents submits that he may be permitted to avail a remedy by filing appropriate a complaint etc. 2 Page 2 of 2 before the relevant Court, as petitioner No.1 has not attained age of majority yet. Order accordingly. Learned counsel for petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of I.O does not press this petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of along with listed application with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
